previousDayImpact: Spain's victory over Austria provided a consistent 11-point boost to Team Mack, Metcalf Hurts, and Team Camouflage Cndm, helping them gain ground in the standings.
Portugal's win over Croatia created separation for Hubba Hubba CD's Nutz and Brent's Daddy, who both secured 10 points while Team Jordan earned only 1 point from their Croatia pick.
leaderboardSummary: Brent's Daddy surged 4 spots to 5th place following their 10-point gain from Portugal.
Team Mack climbed 2 spots to 8th place after picking up 11 points from Spain.
Hubba Hubba CD's Nutz moved up 2 spots to 4th place, while Team Jordan and Team koyn both fell 2 spots in the rankings.
leverageWatch: Egypt's match against Australia is a key point of interest for Team Godfather and Brent's Daddy, who both roster Egypt, while Bijan Mustard and Team Camouflage Cndm look for points from Australia.
Argentina's match against Cape Verde offers significant leverage for Hubba Hubba CD's Nutz, Team Jordan, Team koyn, and Team Camouflage Cndm, who all have Argentina on their rosters.
